reason: Original evidence pinned base commit SHA 733ef3e, which is not an ancestor of current HEAD (side effect of the e8cda6b squash noted by the wave-07 autopsy, finding H-8, remediation R-6). Per impl/governance/evidence-policy.md's revision-pinning rule, this record re-runs the cited command against the current, ancestor-valid HEAD and records the result as status `retested`, without overwriting the original record.
execution_command: WOWAPI_REQUIRE_DB=1 WOWAPI_TEST_DSN=<local-postgres> go test ./kernel/workflow -run '^$' -bench '^BenchmarkSweepSLABatch$' -benchmem -benchtime=1x -count=1 | go run ./internal/tools/benchbudget <budget-file>. The original cited /tmp/perf04-budgets.txt, an ephemeral path that does not persist in the repository; re-checked against the 3 BenchmarkSweepSLABatch entries in the repo's canonical bench-budgets.txt, which carry identical threshold values (due_10<=200,000,000ns/50,000allocs; due_1000<=500,000,000ns/50,000allocs; due_100000<=30,000,000,000ns/50,000allocs).
result: PASS, all 3 tiers within budget: due_10=120,785,666ns/4,205 allocs; due_1000=107,321,792ns/9,811 allocs; due_100,000=2,739,424,333ns/9,788 allocs — same order of magnitude as the original's 135M/107M/2.34B ns figures, no divergence.
